name: GH_DragDropFileAction
summary: Enumerates the possible actions for drag+drop loading ghx files.

enum_values.name: Open
enum_values.summary: Open the file(s) as a new document.

enum_values.name: Insert
enum_values.summary: Insert the file(s) into the current document.

enum_values.name: Group
enum_values.summary: Insert the file(s) into the current document as separate groups.

enum_values.name: Cluster
enum_values.summary: Insert the file(s) into the current document as clusters.
